query:
ALTER TABLE customers
  ADD COLUMN companyName varchar(256) AFTER contactName,
  ADD COLUMN phone varchar(64) AFTER email,
  ADD COLUMN customerType enum('regular','dealer','vip','aftersales') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'aftersales' AFTER phone,
  ADD COLUMN salesRep varchar(128) AFTER customerType,
  ADD COLUMN qualificationStatus enum('pending','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'approved' AFTER salesRep,
  ADD COLUMN qualificationNotes text AFTER qualificationStatus,
  ADD COLUMN activationToken varchar(128) AFTER passwordChanged,
  ADD COLUMN activationTokenExpiresAt timestamp NULL AFTER activationToken,
  ADD COLUMN loginFailCount int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER status,
  ADD COLUMN lockedUntil timestamp NULL AFTER loginFailCount,
  ADD COLUMN createdByAdminName varchar(128) AFTER createdByAdminId,
  ADD COLUMN firstLoginAt timestamp NULL AFTER lastLoginAt,
  ADD COLUMN passwordChangedAt timestamp NULL AFTER firstLoginAt;
